title: Fix send button clipping in chat input area

requirements.summary: Fix the send button in the MessageInput component so it is fully visible and not clipped or cut off
acceptanceCriteria: The send button is fully visible in the chat input area at all viewport sizes
No part of the send button is clipped, hidden, or overflowing its container
The input textarea and send button coexist in the same row without overlapping
Existing functionality (text input, character counter, GIF/image/voice buttons) remains unchanged

file_operations.description: Fix the send button layout to prevent clipping by adjusting flex constraints, padding, and minimum width on the input container and button wrapper. Ensure the send button has sufficient space and is not cut off by adding proper flex-shrink: 0 to the button, adjusting the textarea flex-grow properties, and verifying adequate right padding on the container. Preserve the light gray background (bg-muted), borderless styling, circular character counter, and all existing functionality (GIF/image/voice buttons).
